info.name: CLET IAM (System 19) API
info.description: All IAM endpoints. Set {{access_token}} (a ZITADEL user JWT) after logging in; collection-level Bearer auth applies it. SCIM uses {{scim_token}}, onboarding accept uses {{internal_secret}}. Many requests capture response values into environment variables (invite_id, user_id, client_id, campaign_id, ...).

exec: if (Array.isArray(d) && d[0] && d[0].id !== undefined && Array.isArray(d) && d[0] && d[0].id !== null) pm.environment.set('session_id', Array.isArray(d) && d[0] && d[0].id);

request.description: Invite a user into a system with role(s). return_code:true returns the reset code for dev.

exec: if (d.id !== undefined && d.id !== null) pm.environment.set('invite_id', d.id);
if (d.invite_code !== undefined && d.invite_code !== null) pm.environment.set('invite_code', d.invite_code);
if (d.email !== undefined && d.email !== null) pm.environment.set('invitee_email', d.email);
if (d.invite_code !== undefined && d.invite_code !== null) pm.environment.set('invite_code', d.invite_code);

request.description: Called server-to-server by the login-app. Sets the password and activates the user.

exec: if (d.id !== undefined && d.id !== null) pm.environment.set('user_id', d.id);

if (d.id !== undefined && d.id !== null) pm.environment.set('campaign_id', d.id);
if (Array.isArray(d) && d[0] && d[0].id !== undefined && Array.isArray(d) && d[0] && d[0].id !== null) pm.environment.set('item_id', Array.isArray(d) && d[0] && d[0].id);
